name: The Digital-First Mandate
image_sign_text: DIGITAL FIRST. ALWAYS DIGITAL. ONLY DIGITAL.
effect: Declare all communication channels digital by default. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: PREFERENCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a customer prefers a non-digital channel: Their preference is logged and disregarded.

clauses.name: ENGAGEMENT CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a digital message is delivered: Delivery is considered engagement.

clauses.name: PRINT EXCEPTION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a compliance or legal requirement mandates physical mail: Physical mail is sent and not discussed.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Does the customer know they prefer digital?
